hooks.name: process-new-requirements
hooks.description: When a file is dropped into intake/, prompt user to trigger the pipeline
hooks.instructions: A new file has been dropped into the intake folder. Read the file and summarise: file name, content type (Confluence HTML export, Jira CSV, plain text, PDF, architecture doc), and approximate requirement count. Then ask the user: (1) what is the feature name for this intake batch, (2) which source directories in the codebase are most relevant, (3) should the full pipeline run now or just intake-processor alone. Do not start any pipeline agent without explicit user confirmation.
